feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Analytics Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP Analytics Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAC Excel Add-in – How to Create MTD & YTD & Running Totals
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am currently working in SAP Analytics Cloud Excel Add-in using a model imported from SAC and need guidance on the following requirements.

Requirement – Running Totals, MTD & YTD in Excel Add-in

I need to create: MTD (Month-to-Date),YTD (Year-to-Date) & Running Totals calculations in Excel Add-in based on the Posting Date dimension.

The model already contains:

  • Dimensions: G/L Account, Posting Date

  • Measure: Amount in Company Code

What is the approach to calculate them ?

Thankyou!!

entry.title: conditional formating on column totals in SAC
entry.content: How do I create conditional formatting on the column totals (bottom) in SAC (validate the total ie, the value between an interval).

entry.title: Script variables used in URL parameters don't seem to be recognized by iOS mobile app
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am attempting to navigate from Story A to Story B, and simultaneously pass the value of an input control from Story A to Story B. It appears that the variables and scripts I’ve set up work as expected on PC and iOS mobile browsers. However, they do not function correctly in the iOS mobile app. I’m unsure if specific design configurations are required to make this functionality work in the mobile app.

Below is my script. I created a script variable named "InputControl" in both Story A and Story B. In story A, I used: NavigationUtils.openStory('XXXXX','XXXXX',[UrlParameter.create("p_InputControl",Value1)],true). In Story B, I used: Application.showMessage(ApplicationMessageType.Success, InputControl);.

In PC or iOS mobile browser, I can see application message Value1 in story B; in the iOS app, the application message is blank. Has anyone encountered a similar issue before?

Any tips or guidance would be highly appreciated! Thank you in advance.

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: SAC How to generate new records between existing dates / records?
entry.content:
Hello all,

Imagine there are Actual and Forecast data but not for all months continuously . It is normal that data are not booked at each and every month. However, I need to calculate duration in months between the first and the last existing records. For example, in the picture below there are records for 2026.02, then 2026.07, and then 2027.05-2027.09. So, how to calculate DATEDIFF between 2026.02 and 2027.09 ?

As an option, I was going to generate value 1 for all involved months, so that sum of them will be equal to number of months between the first and the last record. It can be easily achieved for the booked months above but how to generate new records for 2026.03-2026.06 and 2026.08-2027.04 ?

Any ideas, please?

Br, Oleksandr

entry.title: Performance improvement of Dashboard in SAC using a data model with live connection
entry.content:
Hi All,

To my knowledge there is little or nothing that can be done at the frontend in SAC (SAP analytics cloud) story to improve the performance of a slow running story that uses a live connection. Could anyone please let me know if there are any steps that can be taken to achieve performance optimization/improvement in such a scenario? at the story level rather than the backend?

 

Regards,

entry.title: SAP Support Request – Comment Saving Error in SAC Story (Issue Occurs Only in One Specific Story)
entry.content:
Subject: Error when saving comments in an SAP Analytics Cloud Story – issue occurs only in one specific story after moving it to a secured SSBI folder

Issue Description

When attempting to save a comment in an SAP Analytics Cloud (SAC) Story, the following error message appears:

“An error occurred while processing your request!
Please save the story and refresh the page!
If the problem persists, please contact your system administrator.”

The error occurs only when saving comments.
All other features and interactions within the story continue to work normally.

Also, creating a new folder within the SSBI Folder and adding a comment box referring to the same Modeller, works. Seem’s like it’s a story specific problem…

entry.title: SAP Analytics Cloud - Fetch Linked Analysis Details
entry.content:
I have multiple charts in my dashboard, and I have enabled Linked Analysis between them.

When a user selects a data point (dimension member) in one chart, the other charts get filtered correctly due to linked analysis.

However, the additional requirement is:

When the user selects a chart (i.e., selects a dimension member), he should be able to clearly see what dimension value has been selected, and this selected dimension should also be visible or accessible in the other charts (for example, via text display or logic).

Ex - I have selected a brand "Hermanos" so the other charts would give me values with respect to my selection.  I just want my chart title to be updated with "Expense per state - Hermanos"
or any which way i just want to get the details of my selection
SAP Analytics Cloud  SAP Predictive Analytics SAP Analytics Cloud, data modeling

entry.title: How to pass selectall values of a single selection filter in UrlParameter of SAC?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am trying to pass a filter value from Story A to Story B. The filter is a single selection filter with 'Select All Option' enabled. I am wondering whether there is a way to pass the selectall selection values in the filter from Story A to Story B.

Below is my scripts to pass one value in the filter. But I don't know how to pass selectall selection in the script.

NavigationUtils.openStory('XXX','XXX',[UrlParameter.create("f01Model","XXX"),UrlParameter.create("f01Dim","Entity"),UrlParameter.create("f01Val","1000"),UrlParameter.create("f01Op","in")],true);

Any tips or guidance would be highly appreciated! Thank you in advance!

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: Inconsistent references of the story - custom widget inside a composite
entry.content:
I created a composite containing a custom widget. 
Whenever I use this composite, I get the following warning.

Resaving the story doesn't resolve the issue. Is it an expected behavior?
I couldn't find anything about composites not supporting custom widgets.

entry.title: Batch Export PDF Showing Repeated First Page Values Since 10 (Script & Batch Export Behavior Change)
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are facing an issue in SAP Analytics Cloud starting from 10th February.

Our report uses a script on the table on result changed event and Batch Export to generate PDFs. Until 9th February, it was working correctly.

Now:

The table data changes correctly for each Tract during Batch Export.

However, the text boxes are not updating.

The values shown on the first page of the PDF are being repeated on all subsequent pages.

No changes were made to the model, script, or report configuration from our side.

Could you please confirm if there was any update or patch released around 10th February-2026 In SAP SAC that might have impacted Batch Export or scripting behavior?

Thanks in advance.

Sumit

entry.title: The time dimension does not have a valid hierarchy.
entry.content: We are using an SAP Analytics Cloud Live connection (InA) to S/4HANA 2021, based on a classic ABAP CDS view defined with define view and annotated with @analytics.dataCategory: #CUBE, along with a corresponding analytical query (@analytics.query: true). In SAC, we are encountering the error: “The time dimension does not have a valid hierarchy.” As a result, time-based variance (Current vs Previous) is not editable, and the Posting Date is treated as a flat characteristic instead of a proper calendar hierarchy. We have tried using @Semantics.businessDate.at and also attempted an association to I_CalendarDate, but SAC Live still does not recognize a valid time hierarchy. Is there a specific requirement or limitation in S/4HANA 2021 when using classic define view CDS for exposing a time hierarchy to SAC Live? Should a define view entity or a different modeling approach be used to ensure proper time hierarchy recognition?

entry.title: How to display row number and column letters like excel in SAC table?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am creating table formulas in SAC. Is it possible to display row number and column letters like excel in SAC table?

Any tips or guidance would be highly appreciated! Thank you in advance!

SAP Analytics Cloud

entry.title: SAP SAC how to populate a measure value to all line items
entry.content:
In SAC, I need to populate the Restricted measure value to all line items in the Story. Measure 1 and 2 are Restricted Measures. Measure 1 = category 'XX'  and 'Sales', measure 2 = Product Line 'ALL'' and 'Gross'. How can I populate ?? with the same value 500 for all the line items. This should happen even if I filter out Product 'OTHER'. from the Table. Data actions is not an option in my case.

ProductMeasure 1Measure 2Calc Measure  
OTHER2050020/500 
AA30??30/500 
BB40??40/500 
CC20??20/500

entry.title: Comments are not supported on dimension properties of a non-generic dimension
entry.content:
After the update over the weekend - I am getting this error on a comment column. The comment column was working fine last week...

"Comments are not supported on dimension properties of a non-generic dimension."

****UPDATE: Never mind, i found out what the problem was as a filter from an organizational dimension was added to the story... I can't delete posts, otherwise I would delete this

entry.title: How to enable Joule for the SAC Tenant Owner in S4 public cloud?
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I'm looking for a solution of the problem I'm currently facing.

I went through the whole Blog and got it done to setup the connection between SAC and Joule in S4 Public Cloud.... but only for a regular user (with BI Admin and Admin role), but not for the SAC tenant Owner (who has no roles).

The first time, this was the result of reading the users, like described in step 4.5 Schedule User and Group Provisioning (optional)

Not sure what the real root cause was... I had the feeling that only users with roles are processed, so I put myself (the owner) into a Team and assigned the Admin roles to the team.

In the second try, it looks like also my user got processed:

However, in S4 public Cloud, when I try to get answer from a SAC model by Joule, I'm asked if my question is related to Ledger 0L and which Company Code ... and that get the information that Joule would not be able to access any SAC tenant.

In contrast to that, my colleague is able to get analytical answers from SAC.... so the whole setup basically works!

Did anybody experience the same issue and did find a solution?

Addition: No, I have no API Access Users in my tenant. This is a fresh TDD SAC, where only 2 Users and 1 Team exists.

Thanks a lot, Martin

entry.title: SAP SAC Story Calculation based on Variable like Option
entry.content:
Hi, I have the below requirement.  I need to calculate Risk Category based on Trust Score at Story level with the below conditions.

Trust Score <= 10, VeryLow

Trust Score >10 <=20, Low

Trust Score >20, High.

I don't want to Hard code the Trust Score in my Calculated Measure, and I should be able to maintain these numbers easily when they change.  What should be the best approach.

 

CustomerTrust ScoreRisk Category
AA10Very Low
BB20Low
CC30High
   

 

@spurwar Your thoughts on this.

entry.title: Using IF DATEDIFF() and TODAY() returns no value
entry.content:
Hello,

 

I've been stuck for some time now trying to use today's date as a reference point in a data action. I want to create a logic that looks at a month, compares it to how far away it is from the current month, and then references a value based off that result. The referencing works, but not the date comparison. So far I've gotten the closest results to what I am looking for using this statement:

IF DATEDIFF([d/Date], TODAY(),"MONTH") <= 0

However, this statement appears to not work because [d/Date] and TODAY() are differently formatted, resulting in always giving the value of 0 and making it useless.

 

Does anybody have an idea on how I can use the current month as a base point for this calculation?

entry.title: Getting 403 forbidden error when fetching data using BW tunnel connection into SAC.
entry.content: Getting 403 forbidden error when fetching data using BW tunnel connection into SAC. We are able to create connections, fetch the 3 dimension into story but as soon as we add 4th dimension the below error pops up

entry.title: SAC Story fails to load on second open – “Communication with the remote system failed”
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m facing an issue in SAP Analytics Cloud.
The story loads normally the first time, but when I close it and reopen it in the same SAC session, I get this error:

“Communication with the remote system failed.”

The story uses a Live Connection. After logging out and in again, the first load works fine, but the second always fails.

Has anyone seen this behavior or knows what might cause it?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: QRC1 2026 Update Memory Problem - Loading Optimization Setting
entry.content:
Hi,

my Story uses about 2GB memory and has Background Loading active. After QRC1 2026 Update this story receives a Out of memory error at 5,4GB memory. After Loading the Viewpoint (Starting Page) it has 2GB memory used. 1sec after that the memory starts to increase rapidly and after 10sec the out of memory error appears.

I changed nothing in this story for months. It tried Viewpoint Loading and the same scenario appears. Only at Loading Optimization Setting = None no out of memory error appears, but the memory use is 3GB.

Override Cache Limit and Minimize Memory Usage is active.

PS: the same old Analytic Application used only 1,2GB memory. The memory usage of the new Story is extremely bad. I hope SAP will fix that soon.

thanks for help
